failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: fold-local train-only temporal-stability state archetype membership with abstention-first US100 M5 schedule replay
failure_asset.next_boundary: next work must change to a new major hypothesis outside C0004; do not retry R0004 by nudging temporal segment count, minimum segment archetype count, stable segment count, top archetype count, daily max entries, stop, target, hold, or session thresholds
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence completed with 8 losing folds, 1 profitable fold, negative total tick net PnL, and negative proxy plus MT5 tick profitability despite target-range entry frequency

supporting_lessons.summary: Closed-bar schedule replay parity passed, while tick execution worsened total net PnL by 11.36 versus logic and changed total trade count by -3; tick execution remains the economic surface.
Train-window temporal-stability archetype eligibility achieved 5.591379 entries per active day but did not fix fold instability or negative economics.

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether fold-local state archetypes become more useful when archetype eligibility requires train-window temporal stability across chronological subsegments instead of aggregate train edge alone
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: fourth C0004 true variant; changes the model fit and score interpretation from aggregate train-fold archetype edge, path-quality filtering, or adverse inversion to train-window temporal stability; not a label-weight, top-count, min-count, daily-entry, stop, target, hold, session, or retry nudge from R0001 through R0003

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
weak proxy evidence cannot skip MT5 validation
proxy must fit temporal-stability archetype rules only inside each rolling train window
proxy result cannot decide whether MT5 validation is attempted
proxy must report stability diagnostics without creating selected claims
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, exit reasons, and position lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure
repair mechanical parity before any hypothesis judgment when mismatch is found

feature.summary: closed-bar state archetype features for volatility, trend, compression, range position, body, and session; no feature set is selected

label.summary: directional forward target-before-stop plus path-quality labels used only inside train folds to score temporal stability; no label is selected

model.summary: train-fold-local temporal-stability archetype model requiring evidence across chronological train subsegments; no model family or objective is selected

trade_logic.summary: fixed-lot discovery schedule enters only temporally stable fold-local archetypes with abstention-first daily selection, then uses schedule replay for MT5 validation
